summary: Quality Feature Testing Complete - All backend APIs (14/14 passed) and frontend UI features working correctly. Quality tab appears in project detail, stats cards display correct counts, all sub-tabs (Checklists, No-Conformidades, MRR, Pruebas de Presión) render properly, CRUD operations for checklists and non-conformities work, PDF download button available.

issues: Minor React warning: Missing 'Description' or 'aria-describedby' for DialogContent - non-blocking

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/quality/checklists?project_id={id} - Returns list of checklists
Backend: POST /api/quality/checklists - Creates new checklist with items
Backend: PUT /api/quality/checklists/{id} - Updates checklist title/status
Backend: GET /api/quality/checklists/{id} - Returns single checklist
Backend: DELETE /api/quality/checklists/{id} - Deletes checklist
Backend: GET /api/quality/nonconformities?project_id={id} - Returns NC list
Backend: POST /api/quality/nonconformities - Creates new NC
Backend: PUT /api/quality/nonconformities/{id} - Updates NC status
Backend: PUT /api/quality/nonconformities/{id} - Updates NC resolution
Backend: GET /api/quality/nonconformities/{id} - Returns single NC
Backend: DELETE /api/quality/nonconformities/{id} - Deletes NC
Backend: GET /api/quality/summary/{project_id} - Returns full quality summary with stats
Backend: GET /api/mrrs?project_id={id} - MRR endpoint returns data (2 MRRs)
Backend: GET /api/inspection-forms?project_id={id} - Pressure tests returns data (4 tests)
Frontend: Quality tab appears in project detail page tabs
Frontend: Stats cards show correct counts (1 Checklist, 1 NC, 2 MRRs, 4 Pressure Tests)
Frontend: Checklists sub-tab renders and shows checklist list
Frontend: Create Checklist dialog opens with title input and item list
Frontend: Save checklist creates new checklist (toast: 'Checklist creado')
Frontend: No-Conformidades sub-tab renders and shows NC list
Frontend: Create NC dialog opens with title, description inputs
Frontend: MRR sub-tab renders showing existing MRR data
Frontend: Pruebas de Presión sub-tab renders showing existing test data
Frontend: PDF download button (Descargar Reporte PDF) visible and clickable

features_verified.quality_tab_in_project_detail: WORKING - Quality tab appears in tabs list
features_verified.quality_stats_cards: WORKING - Shows Checklists, Completed, No-Conformidades, MRRs, Pruebas Presión
features_verified.checklists_crud: WORKING - Create, Read, Update, Delete all functional
features_verified.nc_crud: WORKING - Create, Read, Update, Delete, Status changes all functional
features_verified.mrr_integration: WORKING - MRR data loads in MRR sub-tab
features_verified.pressure_tests_integration: WORKING - Pressure test data loads in Pruebas de Presión sub-tab

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DialogContent missing aria-describedby attribute in ProjectQuality.js dialogs - accessibility warning but non-blocking
seed_data_creation: Test checklist 'TEST_Playwright_Checklist' created during UI testing (cleaned up). Project proj_bfc46dbbc812 has: 1 checklist (QC-0001), 1 non-conformity, 2 MRRs, 4 pressure tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quality feature fully tested and working. Backend endpoints under /api/quality/ handle checklists and nonconformities CRUD. Quality tab in ProjectDetail.js integrates ProjectQuality.js component which has 4 sub-tabs: Checklists, No-Conformidades, MRR (uses ProjectMRR.js), Pruebas de Presión (uses ProjectInspections.js). Quality summary API at /api/quality/summary/{project_id} returns aggregated stats.
